name: anthropic
title: Anthropic Claude API client
nextActions: Optional: route through Cloudflare AI Gateway by setting baseURL
doc:
# Flarecel catalog: Anthropic (Cloudflare Workers)

Uses the official `@anthropic-ai/sdk`, which is fetch-based and runs on Workers without `nodejs_compat`. Create the client per request from `env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`. Route through Cloudflare AI Gateway (via `baseURL`) for caching and spend visibility.

Keep the API key in a Worker secret, never in client code.
